meaning: n.母性,为母之道,母亲身份,母亲们(集合称)
examples: Who could argue against motherhood and apple pie ?
Introduction of the republican motherhood thesis dramatically changed historiography.
According to Kerber, motherhood became pivotal to the fate of the republic, providing justification for an unprecedented attention to female education.
This board of women are amazing mothers, who walk the path of motherhood ahead of me.
There is inequality of motherhood vs fatherhood and the female heavy burden of family planning.
